impact: This gives the PP&D daemon a narrow fixture-first check that third and later completed replenishment tranches rotate to new broad titles instead of repeating earlier broad tranche themes.
summary: Add deterministic supervisor replenishment rotation coverage for completed tranche titles.
target_task: Task checkbox-150: Task checkbox-150: Add supervisor replenishment rotation coverage proving third and later completed tranches do not duplicate the previous broad tranche titles.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
